prompt: Macro underwater photography, deep dark blue abyss, a single glowing jellyfish swimming upwards. The bell of the jellyfish is seamlessly formed by a crumpled, translucent single-use grocery plastic bag. The tentacles are made of tangled, fraying synthetic fishing lines and microplastic threads. Ethereal, haunting, cinematic lighting, hyper-realistic texture, National Geographic style, evoking a sense of tragic suffocation and the replacement of nature with synthetic waste.
dataset_name: Global Plastic Waste by Disposal Method
insight: Millions of tons of plastic are silently infiltrating marine ecosystems, turning living oceans into synthetic graveyards.
